svg.title: WhyBuddy Architecture
svg.desc: Product architecture overview for WhyBuddy updated on 2026-04-26. This 1440 by 900 landscape version preserves the original detailed labels and pastel card style while adding the Web-AIGC 58/58 spec mainline wiring, route mounting, runtime adapters, workflow governance, RAG vector governance, MCP tooling, HITL/Office closure, observability context, and the Task Autopilot Phase 1 closure: 18/18 specs, 345/345 core tasks, 602/602 raw checklist items, plus the shared/server/client projection slice.
svg.text: Frontend - office shell + mission-first cockpit + single primary launch dock + overlays
Mission → Destination / Route / Drive / Fleet / Takeover
goal → route → fleet → drive state → takeover → evidence
shared parser + server projection + tasks-store + cockpit panel
Web-AIGC 58/58 nodes stay as capability pool, not user-facing node list
Socket.IO telemetry + replay evidence + preview callbacks
Score below threshold - revise and re-execute
Numbered flows: ①-⑮ show the data path from user query to execution result
2026-04-26 snapshot - Web-AIGC 58/58 sealed - Task Autopilot Phase 1 closed: 18/18 specs, 345/345 core, 602/602 raw - runtime deepening next
